Tak więc coraz więcej polskich firm dołącza do globalnego łańcucha wsparcia F35.

profile_bio.description: We specialize in defense tech, connecting customers with integrated solutions to ensure America and its allies can achieve peace through strength.

value.string_value: We strongly support the U.S. Army’s push to accelerate open architecture and true interoperability.
Lockheed Martin Partners with U.S. Army on Rapid Integration Initiative

quoted_tweet.text:
Speed matters on the battlefield. 🇺🇸

The @USArmy led by @SecArmy Dan Driscoll and defense leaders are launching the "Right to Integrate" (R2I) Hackathon to kill information silos and mandate open architecture. 

We are integrating at the speed of digital information.

Full details: https://t.co/yn4ltk4hjB 

Defense Industry Partners:

@anduriltech @Boeing @generaldynamics @L3HarrisTech @LockheedMartin @northropgrumman @PalantirTech @RTX_News and Perennial Autonomy

profile_bio.description: Official X page of the United States Army.  (Following, shares, likes and links ≠ endorsement)

media.ext_alt_text: WASHINGTON \u2014 Secretary of the Army Dan Driscoll and leaders from Anduril, Boeing, General Dynamics, L3Harris, Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman, Palantir, Perennial Autonomy, and RTX announced today that they will \u201Csprint\u201D to conduct a series of combined Army and defense industry partnered hackathon events to integrate critical military technology systems.\n\nThis \u2018Right to Integrate\u2019 hackathon, or R2I, is an Army-Industry partnered sprint that will ensure offensive and defensive weapon systems, and business systems across the Army, can collectively integrate, share data, and communicate with each other.
